title: Barcelona Hotels Community
body: [![Experiencias Barcelona](http://farm3.static.flickr.com/2514/3701764526_d23c5141ba_m.jpg "experiencias.barcelonahotels.es")](http://experiencias.barcelonahotels.es/ "Barcelona Hotels Community")[Barcelona Experiences](http://experiencias.barcelonahotels.es/) is yet another community created by **[Socialtec](http://www.socialtec.es)**, in addition to a fantastic destination tourism website like the one for the Canary Island of [La Palma](http://www.lapalma.es/), which we are also working on. The [Gremi d'Hotelers de Barcelona](http://www.barcelonahotels.es/) has commissioned us to create this **community** for the Mediterranean city and capital of Modernism, **where visitors and residents can share their experiences**. Now you can also win fantastic hotel stays by participating in the [Gaudí-themed photo contest](http://experiencias.barcelonahotels.es/concursos/2009-06-27-las-mejores-fotos-de-gaud). As with [my other projects](http://www.xarop.com/category/works/), my role has been to design the screens and the various graphic elements that make up this website.
